Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Aug-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Lee (Petitioner)in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has concerns regarding the matter going forward without counsel to assist, and inquired as to how Ms. Lee planned to go forward. Ms. Lee stated that there is only 1 beneficiary, the matter is not being contested, that she and her husband are retired, that the only outstanding debt is the mortgage on the property, that there are only a few transactions to be settled, that the checking account will be transferred to the estate along with the property and stocks, that the vehicle will be donated, that the taxes will be paid and that this will save on attorney's fees. The Court stated that there has been extensive guidance by the court staff, that the matter will be continued to see if Ms. Lee can obtain counsel and provided a list of paralegals to Ms. Lee. Ms. Lee stated that she had a "to do" list and read said list to the court. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to August 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that Ms. Lee will provide a detailed plan of the next steps or that counsel will appear at the hearing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Jul-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
